title: BuiltUpDoubleRibbed
description: BuiltUpDoubleRibbed: Property for 2D analytical elements, made up of one slab supported by double parallel ribs running in one direction beneath them. Ribs and slab can all be made up of different materials.

Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

TopThickness.description: The thickness of the slab sitting on top of the ribs. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RibThickness.description: Width of each rib. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RibHeight.description: Height of the ribs, equal to the distance between the bottom of the slab and bottom of the ribs. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RibSpacing.description: Centre-centre distance between the centre of the double ribs. Measured perpendicular to the rib direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RibInnerSpacing.description: Distance between the double ribs, measured from the side of one to the side of the other. Measured perpendicular to the rib direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Material.description: Structural material of the top slab. If no material is provided for the ribs then this material is used for them as well. IMaterialFragment: Base interface for structural materials used by structural properties or as a fragment of the physical material.

RibMaterial.description: Structural material of the ribs. If nothing is provided, the Material will be used instead. IMaterialFragment: Base interface for structural materials used by structural properties or as a fragment of the physical material.

Direction.description: Specifies if the ribs are running in local x or y direction.

PanelType.description: Defines what type of element this property will be used. Used by some analysis packages.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
